examples: I took a quick peek inside.
The interview was controlled too, and there were doors I could not peek behind, though it would have satisfied my curiosity and hunger for information.
Companies have been paying outrageous fees for a peek at the technical data.
Meanwhile, Google has also offered users a sneak peek at its new Gmail design.
Ms. LEMS: (Singing) You want to pay to take a peek at what drives men insane?
